title: Smart Pause
description: Prevents the game from pausing when you Alt+Tab out. This keeps gameplay running smoothly in the background, allowing your stream to stay active and uninterrupted while you switch tabs.
body:
## 🎮 Smart Pausing (Alt+Tab)

Stay in control even when you switch tabs.

**Smart Pausing** prevents your game from freezing when you Alt+Tab out, keeping everything running smoothly in the background. This is perfect for streamers who want to interact with chat, adjust settings, or multitask without interrupting gameplay.

### ✨ Why it matters

* 🔴 Keeps your stream active and engaging
* 💬 Lets you interact with chat without freezing gameplay
* ⚡ Eliminates interruptions when multitasking

### 🚀 How it works

Instead of pausing when the game loses focus, Smart Pausing allows the game to continue running seamlessly—so your viewers never see a pause screen.

### 🎯 Perfect for

* Twitch streamers
* PvP players
* Content creators
* Anyone multitasking while gaming

---

💡 *Stay live. Stay smooth. Stay in control.*
